status_detail: v4 CORS header reorder did NOT fix the issue -- it appears to have made it WORSE. v3 produced empty ACAC ''; v4 now produces a fully invalid HTTP/2 frame (ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR) so Chrome's HTTP/2 stack rejects the response before CORS validation runs. DevTools Response headers (0) with 'Provisional headers are shown' label. Console: POST https://ai.api.gamma.app/ai/v2/render-generation net::ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR + [PromptAndOutlineSettings] error generating outline: Unable to complete request + [deckStyledImages] Failed to select image style -- TypeError: Failed to fetch. NOT a CORS error -- this is an HTTP/2 framing bug. Bug is in engine's HPACK header encoder itself, not header ordering. ChatGPT baseline works because its (different) header set happens to encode validly; mimicking only the ORDER does not fix the encoder.
acac_value: absent (entire response header block rejected at HTTP/2 layer)
errors_observed: [PromptAndOutlineSettings] error generating outline: Unable to complete request
[deckStyledImages] Failed to select image style -- TypeError: Failed to fetch
DevTools: Response headers (0), Provisional headers are shown
eventstream_events_seen: no (request failed before SSE could begin)
side_finding: Network panel showed THREE generation-related requests -- /ai/v2/generation 200 (succeeded), /ai/v2/render-generation (failed, the one we care about), and a separate /ai/v2/render-generation 201 (succeeded). The 201 is suspicious -- possibly an OPTIONS preflight that worked, or a different code path. Worth investigating whether the failing request differs structurally from the succeeding 201 (e.g., streaming SSE vs non-streaming).
root_cause_hypothesis: Engine HPACK header encoder bug. v3 was empty ACAC; v4 reorder + Vary + Expose-Headers made it invalid framing. Requires engine code dive into HPACK / response-header-block construction for SSE responses. Compare working chatgpt frame bytes vs gamma broken frame bytes at wire level.
recommendation_for_dev: Engine code dive: HPACK encoder for intercepted SSE response. Capture raw H2 frame bytes for both chatgpt (working) and gamma (broken) and diff.
Investigate why /ai/v2/render-generation 201 (the parallel succeeded one) differs from the failing one -- different code path? non-streaming?
Consider rolling back to v3 baseline temporarily (empty ACAC was at least valid HPACK).
notes: Cycle 95 R-3 -- gamma v4 CORS header reorder verify. FAIL with regression -- v4 introduced HTTP/2 framing bug. Subagent 4m30s, within 5min soft timeout.
